measurement: SG range-dependent core-hit rate — HARDENED per-SHOT re-read (coreband2)
supersedesNote: Second, per-SHOT (not per-pellet) read of the same fight as coreband-drake-sg.json; Fable-pre-op-approved test. Unit of analysis = the SHOT (10 pellets share one aim point). Confirms and refines the earlier read.
focusReason: solo recording — Drake is the only unit, therefore the focus (no team, self-burst FB)

colourConvention.orange+critIcon: crit non-core (=1.5x white; e.g. mid 25672->38508, near 33374->46210)
colourConvention.red+CORE_HIT_text: CORE hit (counted). Values seen: 51345 (=25672x2, mid/far/midfar unbuffed x2 core), 71882 (near, ~33374x2, crit+core pellet), 559046 (near, large core on exposed gem)
colourConvention.exclude: 7-digit ~2-5.9M BURST (1254% coef); red radial BLOOM VFX on the boss arms (NO number inside — this unit throws red spider-lily hit VFX at ALL ranges, a key confound); persistent red UI (TARGET bars, 00X ammo/target counters, the red core gem at the crosshair); green/red heal splash over the CHARACTER

R2_pelletPopupCorrespondence.result: CONFIRMED. Off-boss pellets render NOTHING (frames observed with only 1 of 10 pellets producing a popup when the boss was narrow/receded). On-boss pellets each render one popup at the crosshair; a shot produces ~5-8 popups at NEAR (large boss) and fewer at range. All 10 pellets share one aim point so popups cluster tightly. Consecutive shots' popups DO linger/merge (~0.4-0.5 s persistence vs ~0.35 s shot interval), so per-shot attribution requires 60 fps stepping; pooled sampling was done at <=2 fps so a given popup appears in essentially one sampled frame.

R3_coreCritRender.result: CONFIRMED. A core+crit renders as a RED number with 'CORE HIT' text AND an orange crit icon to its left (e.g. near 71882) — the crit does NOT mask the red/CORE-HIT. Core-only is red 'CORE HIT' with no crit icon (e.g. 559046, 51345). Legible at high zoom even against the dark boss body.

bossDistanceCrossCheck.near: boss right, CLOSE/LARGE — genuinely close (v40-77 and v151-183), largest apparent size, elevated damage from self-burst FB buff
bossDistanceCrossCheck.far: boss center, SMALL/RECEDED — smallest apparent size, frequent RELOADING + smoke (v77-113)

method: Per band, sampled boss-crop frames at 2 fps across the band's window(s) (~one distinct shot per sample) plus full-res 60 fps zooms to count pellets per shot and to distinguish red CORE-HIT NUMBERS from red VFX blooms. Cores counted ONLY as red 'CORE HIT' damage numbers. Pellet denominators are best-effort counts (heavy overlap + blooms => ~+-30% on pooled pellet totals); CIs are Wilson 95% on the pooled pellet count and are therefore approximate.

bands.confidence: high — red items at mid are VFX blooms + UI, no red CORE-HIT numbers across all sampled shots

bands.bossDistance: close/large (right); coincides with self-burst Full Burst (values elevated to 33374)
bands.confidence: medium-high — cores clearly present; magnitude ~7-10% per pellet with +-3-4pp uncertainty (pellet-count estimation + 559046-vs-skill2 ambiguity). Red-on-dark visibility makes near a mild LOWER bound.
high that ~0, BUT could not reach 40 clean shots (boss small + smoke-obscured + she reloads often at range) — 28 shot-samples. No red CORE-HIT numbers seen.
bands.caveat: shot count < 40 due to sparse readable fire at max range

bands.confidence: medium — one confirmed red CORE-HIT (51345 = 25672x2) at v117; rate very low. A red-tinted (FB) midfar frame still showed no core, so the signal tracks RANGE not FB.

summary.headline: SG per-SHOT core-pellet fraction is ~0 at mid/far, ~0.5% (one rare core) at midfar, and ~7% (CI 4.7-10.9%) at NEAR. Cores are strongly range-concentrated at close range (near >> mid ~ midfar ~ far ~ 0). This REPLICATES the earlier per-pellet read (coreband-drake-sg.json: near ~0.088, others ~0).
summary.mechanistic: Boss is a multi-part spider mech whose weak point is a small central red core gem at the crosshair, flanked by large armoured arms/legs. Auto-aim spreads all 10 pellets; only at CLOSE range does the spread reliably land a pellet on the small gem. Body/armour pellets render white 25672/33374; a pellet on the exposed gem renders red 'CORE HIT' (51345 = x2 of a reduced hit, or 559046 = x2 of the FULL unreduced gem). Boss geometry caps the achievable SG core rate an order of magnitude below the hypothesised ~100%-at-optimal-range.
confounds: RED VFX BLOOMS: this unit throws red radial spider-lily hit-VFX on the boss arms at ALL ranges (no number inside). These are NOT cores and were the main mis-read risk; only red 'CORE HIT' NUMBERS were counted.

FB/buff overlap: near windows coincide with self-burst Full Burst (skill1 ATK+11.85% -> values 33374 vs 25672 unbuffed elsewhere). Core RATE is a geometry/hit-rate phenomenon, not damage-buff-driven; a red-tinted (FB) midfar frame showed 0 core, so the signal tracks RANGE.

559046-vs-skill2: the large near red 559046 COULD be skill2 (98.55% of ATK, every 10 shots) rather than an SG gem-core. Argues AGAINST skill2: 559046 is range-CONCENTRATED at near, whereas skill2 is range-INDEPENDENT and no large red appears at mid/far/midfar. The x2-type reds (71882 near / 51345 midfar) are unambiguous SG pellet cores. Even excluding 559046 entirely, near retains a nonzero core signal above the other bands.
Visibility bias understates near (red-on-dark), not far (red-on-grey-sky would be obvious) -> near is a mild lower bound; far 0 is reliable.
summary.simRelevance: Engine AUTO_CORE_RATE is a flat 0.85 (calibrated, marked). For Drake's SG on THIS boss the observed core rate is <=~10% at NEAR and ~0 at range — the flat 0.85 is far too high here, and it is range-dependent, not flat. Single boss with a small core gem; do NOT over-generalise across bosses/weapons.
summary.confidence: Overall medium-high. Qualitative result (cores at near only, order-of-magnitude below 0.85) is robust and replicates the prior read. Absolute near fraction has ~+-3-4pp uncertainty.
